steps.title: Use the habitat evidence
steps.content: Pale hearts in icefishes were once linked to polar habitats, but researchers found tropical teleost species with pale hearts too. That means myoglobin deficiency may occur regardless of habitat.

steps.title: Reject habitat control
steps.content: B would say habitat controls or mediates the deficiency, which the new evidence challenges. C reverses the relationship by suggesting deficiency predicts habitat. D says habitat hides the deficiency, but the passage does not discuss concealment. The remaining phrase means regardless of. The answer is A.
